history.title: Ars nova
history.description: "For other uses, see Ars nova (disambiguation). Page of the French manuscript Livres de Fauvel, Paris, B. N. Fr. 146 (ca. 1318), ""the first practical source of Ars nova music"". [1]Ars nova ( Latin for new art) [2] refers to a musical style which flourished in France and the Burgundian Low Countrie
